text:
Market today: AI chip demand is the real driver, pushing tech higher. My names are mostly in this sector.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL at -38.96% and SPAL is a TRIM at -38.87%. Both are leveraged ETFs that decay, and your margin amplifies these drops. PTNM is a NEW position at -15.25% and needs watching.

Watch: ASML's forecast hike on AI chip demand is a key signal for the sector.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged tech positions and watching for sector strength.
plays: Trim SOXL: The SELL signal and -38.96% loss warrant cutting exposure, especially on margin.
Consider trimming SPAL: It's a leveraged ETF with a -38.87% loss; evaluate its risk on margin.
No new buys today - hold and watch
